data.title: Inventor from Paducah, Ky. creates THE SMART CHARGER for electric cars; aims to solve low battery issues.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on September 18, 2025, an inventor from Paducah, Kentucky shared their inspiration for creating a portable backup power source for electric vehicles called THE SMART CHARGER. The inventor aimed to address concerns regarding low or dead batteries, focusing on creating a solution to prevent worries and delays. This innovative design offers a new approach to electric vehicle charging, catering to the needs of users facing battery-related challenges.

data.title: MSI launches game-changing EV Series chargers with rugged durability, smart controls, and 5-year warranty, all at breakthrough prices.
data.description: A new line of Electric Vehicle (EV) Series chargers has emerged, boasting superior power, longevity, and affordability compared to competitors. These chargers come with smart controls, rugged durability, and a notable five-year warranty, providing a breakthrough in pricing. This innovation was unveiled in CITY OF INDUSTRY, Calif. on September 18, 2025. MSI, a company with nearly forty years of experience, has once again raised the bar in performance standards.

data.title: 17th Annual 2025 Globee® Awards winners revealed in San Francisco, recognizing breakthrough innovations.
data.description: The Golden Bridge Awards® have recently acknowledged groundbreaking innovations, daring concepts, and impactful changes within various industries. Taking place in San Francisco on September 18, 2025, the Globee® Awards, prominent hosts of leading business award ceremonies and rankings globally, revealed the latest recipients of their prestigious honors. This recognition highlights exceptional contributions across sectors, demonstrating the continuous pursuit of excellence and advancement in today's competitive landscape.

data.title: Gaby Natale launches Menopausia.com, the first bilingual platform for women navigating menopause and perimenopause. Aims to redefine midlife and longevity, disrupts silence with science, community, and commerce.
data.description: A groundbreaking entrepreneur is making waves by blending science, community, and commerce to reshape perceptions of midlife and longevity as potent phases of life. In Dallas on September 18, 2025, Gaby Natale, a renowned figure with three Emmy awards, bestselling books, and international acclaim as a keynote speaker, is leading this transformative movement.

data.title: Eastern Bank welcomes LOUD Security Systems as commercial banking customer; serving 13,000 customers across metro Atlanta and 20 states.
data.description: Eastern Bank in Boston has welcomed LOUD Security Systems, Inc. as its newest commercial banking customer. LOUD Security Systems, founded in 1995, is a prominent provider of security, fire, access control, and video systems for residential, commercial, and government clients. Headquartered in Kennesaw, Georgia, the company serves nearly 13,000 customers in metro Atlanta and 20 states. They offer a range of services including sales, installation, service, and monitoring of security systems like intrusion and fire alarms.

data.title: Utz Brands to invest in upgrading Hanover campus, including a new Utz Employee Hub at 900 High Street, starting in 2026.
data.description: In Hanover, Pennsylvania, Utz Brands, Inc. (NYSE: UTZ) has revealed plans to enhance its facilities. The project will involve multiple phases and start in the upcoming months. The focal point will be the Utz Employee Hub, set to be constructed by 2026 at 900 High Street. This will modernize Utz's headquarters and serve as a contemporary workspace for various teams within the Hanover campus. Utz is a key player in the U.S. salty snacks sector and is dedicated to improving its operational infrastructure.

data.title: Afore Insurance appoints Eric Korpalski as CFO, part of their expansion plan of independent insurance agencies.
data.description: Alpharetta, Georgia - September 18, 2025 - Afore Insurance Services, LLC disclosed today that Eric Korpalski has been appointed as the Chief Financial Officer of the company. Afore, a rapidly growing buyer and manager of independent insurance agencies across the nation, made the announcement. Mr. Korpalski's arrival at Afore brings an experienced professional to lead financial operations.

data.title: DuPont announces plans to separate electronics business, unveil spin-off brand "Qnity". Will outline 3-4% sales growth and 8-10% EPS growth at Investor Day on Nov 1.
data.description: DuPont de Nemours, Inc. (NYSE: DD) made public its intention to separate its electronics business in January. The spin-off was named Qnity in May. DuPont revealed plans to hold its 2025 Investor Day on Nov. 1 with top executives introducing the post-spin-off portfolio. Key topics will include value-creation strategies and financial projections. CEO Lori Koch described this move as a pivotal moment for the company to enhance profitability. Medium-term financial objectives include 3-4% organic sales growth CAGR, a 150-200 basis points increase in operating EBITDA margin, and 8-10% adjusted EPS growth CAGR. Separately, agricultural science leader Corteva is considering a breakup to protect its seed unit from potential risks. Additional details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Audi debuts first E5 Sportback with Ambilight's EC smart dimming sunroof in Shenzhen, China, signaling a major milestone.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on September 18, 2025, Audi debuted the E5 Sportback as its first mass-produced electric vehicle. The vehicle includes Ambilight's electrochromic smart dimming sunroof as a standard feature on premium trims. This release represents a significant achievement for Audi in the EV market.

data.title: Kelyniam Global, Inc. got FDA clearance on Sep 18, 2025, for Fusion™ BCP-PEEK implant. #Cantklyniam #FDA510k
data.description: In Canton, Connecticut on September 18, 2025, Kelyniam Global, Inc. revealed that they have obtained 510(k) clearance from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration for their Fusion™ Cranial and craniofacial implant solutions. Kelyniam is recognized as a top supplier of personalized cranial and craniofacial implants.

data.title: CAKE price rockets to $2.76, up 8.23% as record $58.7B trading volume boosts bullish momentum.
data.description: The price of CAKE surged to $2.76, marking an 8.23% increase in daily gains. This increase followed PancakeSwap's announcement of a record-breaking $58.7 billion trading volume in August, along with strategic token burn initiatives.

data.title: AI now the top priority for global insurance executives in 2025, surpassing inflation, survey shows.
data.description: In a recent International Insurance Society survey, it was revealed that artificial intelligence (AI) has taken the top spot as the most crucial industry priority.

data.title: Churchill Stateside Group funds $11M Tax-Exempt Construction Loan for Senior Housing in New Orleans.
data.description: Churchill Stateside Group, LLC, a real estate and renewable energy financial services company based in Clearwater, Florida, recently finalized an $11 million Tax-Exempt Construction Loan for Canal Crossing. This project, situated in New Orleans, Louisiana, involves the development of a 49-unit affordable Low Income Housing Tax Credit senior housing complex. Canal Crossing aims to repurpose a historic building, combining affordable housing initiatives with architectural preservation.

data.title: US CPSC surpasses Biden-era recall record with more than 100 days left in 2025, reflecting stronger safety measures.
data.description: On September 18, 2025, the U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission revealed that it has exceeded the total number of product safety recalls and warnings from 2024. This milestone was reached over three months ahead of the year's end. The increase in recalls and warnings illustrates a significant improvement in the commission’s ability to identify and address safety concerns promptly and effectively.
